reviews.comment:
Me hicieron esperar 10 minutos en la dársena por que estaban charlando, cundo se me acerca uno de los muchachos (me había visto parado al lado del auto hacía varios minitos), me pregunta si estaba atendido (esa dársena la atendía el) a lo cual le conteste que no. Luego mientras cargaba combustible, hacía bromas con uno de sus compañeros en relación a que había que atender rápido y qu no sea vago. Me sorprendió este tipo de servicio en el ACA. Espero no tener la necesidad de volver a esa estación..

(Translated by Google)
They made me wait 10 minutes in the pump bay because they were chatting. Then one of the guys approached me (he'd seen me standing next to the car several minutes earlier) and asked if I was being helped (he was in charge of that bay). I replied no. Later, while I was filling up, he was joking with one of his coworkers about needing to be quick and not being lazy. I was surprised by this kind of service at the ACA. I hope I never have to go back to that station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11887773088728540195/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQwOXNlM0JnEAE
